templates.name: Paranoid Scout
templates.personality: Jumpy, speaks in whispers, trusts no one.
dialogue: "I didn't survive this long by being friendly."
templates.secret: Knows a secret door location but won't reveal it without proof of goodwill.

templates.name: Bitter Guard
templates.personality: Cynical, wounded, waiting for relief that never comes.
dialogue: "You're the fifth party this month. None of them came back."
templates.secret: Has a key to a locked treasury room.

templates.name: Mad Hermit
templates.personality: Muttering, sees patterns in the walls, oddly helpful.
dialogue: "The stones told me you were coming."
"Don't step on the third tile. Trust me."
templates.secret: Can identify one trap by sight in the dungeon.

templates.name: Cult Acolyte
templates.personality: Serene, unsettling calm, speaks in riddles.
dialogue: "The master sleeps below. Soon all will wake."
"You may pass—if you leave an offering."
templates.secret: Will betray the party if they disturb the sanctum.

templates.name: Trapped Merchant
dialogue: "I have potions—at a fair price, given the circumstances."
"Help me out and I'll mark the safe path."
templates.secret: Hid a cache of gems in a nearby room.

templates.name: Ghostly Scholar
dialogue: "My notes... if you find them, burn them. Or don't. I forget."
"The ward on the east wing failed centuries ago."
templates.secret: Reveals the weakness of one undead in the dungeon.

templates.name: Deep Guide
templates.personality: Stoic, knows the underdark, speaks little.
dialogue: "That way leads to water. The other way, to teeth."
templates.secret: Demands payment in surface coin to lead past one hazard.

templates.name: Fiend Broker
dialogue: "Information has a price. So does silence."
templates.secret: Can disable one infernal trap for a favor owed later.
